spec_match.rationale: Out-of-order mode now sorts and schedules dispatches by arrival time, so later available chunks are logged while the delayed chunk is still pending.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive: lets the user specify the delayed chunk index, delay duration, and interval ms, with dynamic progress tracks and interactive mode switches.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the description of letting users pick delay offsets and visually inspect logs.

edge_cases.rationale: Validates input numbers (min/max limits) and manages button disabling states safely.

references.rationale: The see-also section includes the required ChromeStatus reference link.

design_system.rationale: Fits the repository design perfectly, with crisp panel layouts, interactive input fields, and distinct console logging colors.

summary: The visualizer now preserves the old in-order blocked path but schedules Chrome 150 out-of-order dispatches independently by arrival time. The default delayed-chunk setup logs chunks 4, 5, and 6 before delayed chunk 3, and the page now includes the required ChromeStatus reference.
